title: andinia spiralis
intro: Andinia spiralis, also known as the "Peruvian ginseng," is a plant species native to the Andes mountains, characterized by its unique, spiraling flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful for treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Andinia spiralis include improved cognitive function, enhanced immune system function, and reduced stress levels, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Andinia spiralis is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and can be found in various herbal supplements and traditional medicine products.
